title: justicia thomensis
intro: Justicia thomensis, also known as the endemic plant of São Tomé and Principe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Justicia thomensis include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in water to be consumed as a herbal remedy, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
